author: DominicVainMod
content:
@here

If you guys haven't seen, our Roadmap Reports will be delivered in 3 week cadences and wrapped inside The Atlas Star from now on.

For more context on this change, our new 3 week schedule is as follows:
Week 1: Roadmap Scan/Atlas Star
Week 2: Town Hall
Week 3: Special Content drop

To complement this new schedule, we've added the ⁠unknown channel for everyone to easily read all of those juicy updates from Star Atlas.

Last week's updates are already live, where you can see how we'll be formatting these updates in the future!
